I dig a little deeper. The literature says this molecule has a definite bready/roasted/caramel character. The aldehyde group is present, but I believe it is secondary to the furan character. The request said "select *all* that apply". So I want to be comprehensive without being wildly speculative. I'm going to include `ウッディ` (woody).
